ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline – 3 Days Left
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Just a friendly reminder that the deadline for the semester project submission is approaching on Friday, March 29th. Please ensure that your final report and supporting materials are uploaded to the course portal by 5:00 PM.

If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reach out.

Thanks,
Prof. Jane Doe

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice #12345 – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Your QuickBooks account has generated a new invoice (Invoice #12345) for the recent software subscription. To avoid service interruption, please review and approve the invoice within 24 hours.

The total amount due is $249.99. Failure to settle this payment may result in a temporary suspension of your QuickBooks services.

Click here to verify and pay: <URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
QuickBooks Support Team
